---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution
What you'd like to see. Be as specific as helpful (which build — standalone / VST3 — which
section or parameter, expected behavior).

## Alternatives considered
Any workarounds you're using now, or other approaches.

## Additional context
Mock‑ups, references to other editors, MIDI‑spec details, etc.
